friendly_name: DRG completeness (#2843): relation-description parity + activation-gate consolidation
purpose_context: Post-#2833 residue mission under epic #2466; item 1 (anti-pattern corpus) split to #2847. Item A backfills RELATION_DESCRIPTIONS in src/doctrine/drg/models.py with dual-doc parity. Item B fixes a latent correctness bug in charter/drg.py::_node_is_activated and consolidates 3 workaround sites onto one canonical-URN-aware gate. Pre-spec 4-lens research: docs/plans/engineering-notes/drg-completeness-2843-research.md.
purpose_tldr: Close the two items #2833's landing left open: backfill the 12 undescribed DRG Relation descriptions (item A), and consolidate the stem-vs-canonical activation gate that latently drops every directive node under a populated activated_directives list (item B).
